title: PlanetScale - the world's fastest and most scalable cloud hosting for Vitess and Postgres
description: PlanetScale offers the world's fastest and most scalable cloud hosting for Vitess and Postgres.
sectionTitles: The world's fastest and most scalable cloud databases
firstSectionExcerpt:
PlanetScale brings you the fastest databases available in the cloud. Both our Postgres and Vitess databases deliver exceptional speed and reliability, with Vitess adding ultra scalability through horizontal sharding.
